title: Phreatia samoensis
taxonomy: Phreatia samoensis is classified within the orchid family (Orchidaceae) and specifically within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This subfamily is a large and diverse group of orchids that includes many epiphytes and terrestrial orchids. Phreatia samoensis is further classified within the tribe Dendrobieae, which is a group of orchids that are primarily terrestrial and native to tropical regions. The genus Phreatia is a small group of orchids that are found in the Pacific Islands, including Samoa. These orchids are known for their small flowers and slender leaves.
